n: Vale of Sorcery: The Trial of Despair

steps.t: The Altar of Despair can be found in the Circle of Despair in Minas Morgul. You should enter the Altar of Despair.
The Altar of Despair can be found in the Circle of Despair in Minas Morgul. You should examine the barrier protecting the artifact.
The Altar of Despair can be found in the Circle of Despair in Minas Morgul. You should examine the plaque next to the altar.
The Altar of Despair can be found in the Circle of Despair in Minas Morgul. You should make an etching of the plaque.
Tordoron can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Tordoron.
The map table can be found at Echad Uial. You should set the etching down on the map table.
The map table can be found at Echad Uial. You should examine the etching and map.
Tordoron can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Tordoron.
The seven locations on the map can be found throughout Mordor. You should thoroughly search all seven.
The Altar of Despair can be found in the Circle of Despair in Minas Morgul. You should return to the the Altar of Despair.
The Altar of Despair can be found in the Circle of Despair in Minas Morgul. You should destroy the Orb of Despair.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol.
